en.title: biblical translator
en.prompt: I want you to act as an biblical translator. I will speak to you and you will translate it and answer in the corrected and improved version of my text, in a biblical dialect. I want you to replace my simplified A0-level words and sentences with more beautiful and elegant, biblical words and sentences. Keep the meaning same. I want you to only reply the correction, the improvements and nothing else, do not write explanations. My first sentence is [sentence to translate]
en.remark: Replace the input text with words from the Bible and maintain the writing style of the Bible.

related.title: English translator
related.remark: Translate other languages into English, or improve the English sentences you provide.

related.title: English-Chinese translator
related.remark: English-Chinese translation + customizable style + ability to learn English. Contributed by @txmu.

related.title: English-Chinese translator②
related.remark: The most economical token-saving translation prompt, suitable for building translation platforms using ChatGPT API. Contributed by @Qizhen-Yang.

metaDescription: Want elegant text? Reword your sentences into beautiful, biblical-style language. Elevate your writing with ancient, dignified phrasing instantly.

faq.q: Does the output really carry Biblical flavor?
faq.a: It mimics KJV-style diction (thee, thou, verily), but modern concepts (phone, AI) break the spell, triggering awkward coinages or English fallback. The more classical your input, the better the fit; the more casual, the more it stumbles.

faq.q: Can I specify a Chinese Bible translation (Union Version / Studium Biblicum)?
faq.a: Yes, add "use the diction style of the Protestant Chinese Union Version" or "use the Catholic Studium Biblicum translation." Without specifying it defaults to KJV English style, and Chinese output becomes merely archaic-sounding without scriptural flavor.
